placeholderImages.description: Illustration of a smart home lamp control interface, showing switches and lights in a modern house, flat design, clean and minimal, bright colors, suitable for a portfolio of a Front-End web development project.
Clean UI design of a login and registration screen for a web application, with input fields, buttons, minimal flat design, professional, suitable for portfolio.
Interactive task management web application UI illustration, showing checklists, add and delete buttons, bright and modern flat design, suitable for Front-End web development portfolio.
Web dashboard interface illustration with rich user interaction, multiple widgets, responsive design, flat style, professional, suitable for Front-End web portfolio.
Data analytics dashboard showing charts, bar graphs, pie charts, and sentiment analysis visualization, professional flat style, suitable for portfolio of a Data Analysis project.
Time-series line chart and data visualization for predicting rice prices, LSTM AI model concept, clean flat design, professional, suitable for Data Analysis portfolio.
Mobile app UI illustration for a recycling app with AI features, showing multiple screens and icons, user-centered design, clean and colorful, suitable for UI/UX portfolio.
Mobile app UI illustration for a local tour guide app, showing travel booking screens, map and info pages, colorful and user-friendly design, flat style, suitable for UI/UX portfolio.
